description:
A Security Management Specialist at a financial services firm needs to configure per-camera video archive retention periods to meet regulatory compliance requirements. Using the Nx Witness REST API at https://localhost:7001 (Credentials: admin / Admin1234!), update the 'minArchivePeriodS' and 'maxArchivePeriodS' fields (values in seconds) for the following cameras:

- Server Room Camera: min=15552000, max=31536000
- Entrance Camera: min=7776000, max=15552000
- Lobby Camera: min=5184000, max=10368000
- Loading Dock Camera: min=3888000, max=7776000
- Parking Lot Camera: min=2592000, max=5184000

Save a confirmation report to /home/ga/retention_policy_report.json containing a JSON array of objects for each camera, including the name, id, minArchivePeriodS, and maxArchivePeriodS values as verified from the system after the configuration.
